content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance • • Administration • • Executive/Legal • • Enforcement
(916) 322-5662        322-5660        322-5901        322-6441

September 21, 1984

Mike Flick
P.O. Box 2810
Vista, CA 92083

Re: Incompatibility of Public Offices; Our No. T-84-242

Dear Mr. Flick:

Pursuant to your request I am forwarding to you a copy of the Commission's Bulletin for November, 1983, which contains an article regarding "Incompatibility of Public Offices." I believe the article is self-explanatory. You can have the County Counsel assist you in seeking advice from the Attorney General on this issue.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Robert E. Leidigh
Counsel
Legal Division

REL:nwm
Enclosure
